offer: For accounting firms managing 10–50 clients, manual reconciliation of bank statements causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation of bank statements leading to discrepancies
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar accounting workflows
Direct message outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools sharing
try_it: Let users try monthly discrepancy report generation on a few items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Store common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
